{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = gold badge
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Adama]] commissioned a [[gold badge]] carved with the emblem of a [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
